title: Reconnect triggers automatic sync of pending edits
purpose: Cover offline-edit persistence and the reconnect handshake against the Cloudflare emulator.

testCases.description: The client is offline with three pending edits queued; on reconnect all three edits upload within 30 seconds and the queue drains.
The client is online with no pending edits; the sync timer firing generates no network traffic.
The client is offline; a new note is created and the tab is closed. The pending edit survives the next session and uploads on reconnect.
